examples: But they all have a lot of decorations on the walls inside, lots of ornamental plasterwork like statues, which distribute sound very efficiently, reflecting it in all different directions.
The two volumes are covered with dark scratchy SLATE plasterwork, with their Windows facing the woodland.
Stucco: Exterior or interior plasterwork used as three-dimensional ornamentation, as a smooth paintable surface, or as a wet ground for fresco painting.
He showed me into a lovely rose-coloured room with intricate plasterwork on the ceiling and walls.
The mansion's grand staircase had long since been removed, but the dark wood moldings, carved wood details and plasterwork survived in many of the rooms, as do gilded ornamental flowers and leaves.
